summary: Tested Edit Lead / Generate Proposal feature in School CRM New Leads section. All main features working: Edit/Proposal button appears, modal opens with all fields, Generate Proposal creates PDF, Save & Move to Meeting Done works. Fixed backend 422 error by adding proposal_data and fixing quoted_price type. Found pre-existing Invalid Date bug when opening Convert modal for Test School 4.

integration_issues.issue: Runtime error 'Invalid time value' when opening Convert modal - caused by pre-existing data with meeting_date='Invalid Date'
integration_issues.priority: MEDIUM - Pre-existing data issue, not related to new feature

issues: Minor: Missing `aria-describedby` for DialogContent accessibility (console warning)

action_items: Fix data issue: Test School 4 has meeting_date='Invalid Date' which causes runtime error when opening Convert modal
Add date validation to prevent 'Invalid Date' strings from being stored in meeting_date field
critical_code_review_comments: Backend fix applied: Added proposal_data field to SchoolInquiry and SchoolInquiryUpdate models
Backend fix applied: Changed quoted_price type from str to Union[str, int, float] to accept numeric values
The Edit Lead / Generate Proposal modal correctly pre-populates data from proposal_data or onboarding_data
PDF generation uses jsPDF with proper OLL branding and formatting
Data persistence works - Total Amount (₹612,720 = 888 students × ₹690) correctly saved and displayed

success_rate.frontend: 95% (1 pre-existing data issue with Invalid Date)

seed_data_creation: Used Test School 4 from New Leads section for testing. Set 888 expected students @ ₹690/student = ₹612,720
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Lead / Generate Proposal feature in School CRM is fully functional. Backend models updated to include proposal_data field and accept numeric quoted_price values. Test School 4 has a pre-existing Invalid Date bug in meeting_date field that causes Convert modal to crash - this is NOT related to the new feature.

edit_proposal_button.details: Amber button 'Edit / Proposal' appears on all New Lead cards with data-testid='edit-lead-{id}'

edit_lead_modal.details: Modal opens with all fields: Offering, Training Type, Grades From/To, Program Type, No. of Lab Kits, Kit Ratio, Price per Student, Min Students, Expected Students, Total Amount (auto-calculated), Notes

generate_proposal_pdf.details: PDF generated and downloaded as 'Proposal_Test_School_4_12Mar2026.pdf', also saved to school documents. Toast shows 'Proposal generated, downloaded & saved!'

save_details_button.details: Saves proposal_data and quoted_price to inquiry

save_move_to_meeting_done.details: Saves data, sets status to 'meeting_done', populates onboarding_data with grade_pricing. Toast shows 'Lead updated & moved to Meeting Done!'

data_persistence_in_convert.details: Data persists to Convert modal through onboarding_data. ₹612,720 visible in Meeting Done card. Note: Test School 4 has Invalid Date issue preventing Convert modal from opening
